channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-20 to 2026-07-26
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 0 INTERESTING, 7 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 5 kt NNW, water 70°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (6.0 sec); wind direction off (NNW). Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 4.5 sec, wind 8 kt SSE, water 71°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); period too short (4.5 sec); wind direction off (SSE). Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 69°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft); period too short (5.6 sec). Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 10 kt NNW, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft). Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N). Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 3 kt WNW, water 71°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft). Sun 2026-07-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 7.2 sec, wind 3 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNE).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 0 INTERESTING, 7 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 5 kt NNW, water 70°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (6.0 sec); wind direction off (NNW).
  • Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 4.5 sec, wind 8 kt SSE, water 71°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); period too short (4.5 sec); wind direction off (SSE).
  • Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 69°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft); period too short (5.6 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 10 kt NNW, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft).
  • Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N).
  • Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 3 kt WNW, water 71°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft).
  • Sun 2026-07-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 7.2 sec, wind 3 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNE).
